blockedAssertions.blockedBy: Live sync-gate validation requires DB-backed player_sync_metadata/player_matches state, but the current environment cannot resolve the configured Neon/Supabase host.
Live sync-gate validation requires DB-backed player_sync_metadata/player_matches state, but the current environment cannot resolve the configured Neon/Supabase host.
Live sync-gate validation requires DB-backed player_sync_metadata/player_matches state, but the current environment cannot resolve the configured Neon/Supabase host.
Direct fresh-window HTTP validation needs real sync metadata. The validation fixture bypasses the gate, and DB-backed metadata reads are failing.
Allow-path validation for stale/expired players needs real sync metadata and Riot-bound routes backed by working DB state.
Missing-metadata-vs-stored-matches classification requires real player_matches/player_sync_metadata reads, which are unavailable due to DB host resolution failure.
New-player expired-state validation requires real stored-match absence plus sync metadata absence, which cannot be confirmed in the broken DB environment.
Fresh-window infinite-scroll proof requires trustworthy fresh sync metadata. The fixture bypasses the sync gate and cannot prove this assertion.
Stale/expired pagination proof requires real sync metadata and DB-backed exhaustion state.
POST /api/player-sync-status returns 500 because player_sync_metadata upserts cannot reach the configured database host.
Migration backfill validation requires direct database access, but the configured database host is not resolvable in this environment.
The fixture path demonstrates match-history behavior but does not exercise the real new-player DB-backed flow required for full user-testing validation.
Direct fresh-window match-performance rejection needs real sync metadata; the fixture path cannot prove it and DB-backed metadata reads are failing.
Fresh-window Load More gating requires trustworthy syncAge state from the real backend, which is unavailable with broken DB connectivity.

appliedUpdates.description: Added browser flow-validator guidance documenting that the validation fixture bypasses the sync gate and that the current environment has a DB host-resolution blocker.
